entities.name: Vrijen

entities.name: Detection layer
entities.context: part of the knowledge system running in the background

entities.name: Queue layer
entities.context: stores pending requests in the knowledge system

entities.name: Processor layer
entities.context: triggers processes in the knowledge system

relationships.context: Vrijen employs the detection layer in the knowledge system
Vrijen utilizes the queue layer to store requests
Vrijen activates the processor layer through a scheduled task
Vrijen receives notifications upon completion of tasks
